# defectdojo_tool_configuration (Data Source)

Data source for Defect Dojo Tool Configuration

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_tool_configuration" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `auth_title` (String) Title for authentication credentials
- `authentication_type` (String) Authentication type
- `description` (String) The description of the Tool Configuration
- `extras` (String) Additional definitions that will be consumed by scanner
- `name` (String) The name of the Tool Configuration
- `tool_type` (Number) The ID of the Tool Type
- `url` (String) The URL of the tool
- `username` (String) Username for authentication
